allow:
Bash(node -e "
fetch\(''https://tcgbusfs.blob.core.windows.net/blobbus/GetRoute.gz''\)
  .then\(r => { console.log\(''status:'', r.status\); return r.json\(\); }\)
  .then\(d => console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(d\), ''count:'', d.BusInfo?.length\)\)
  .catch\(e => console.error\(''error:'', e.message\)\)
")
